{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's robes
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon's robes]] are black with glowing scarlet decorative red [[scripts]] and a snarling [[dragon]]-turtle on the back.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
